summary: Iteration 49: Tested all 5 priorities - Controlled Calibration (P1), Overconfidence Sigma Widening (P2), Calibration Metrics Segmentation (P3), Asymmetric Weather Summary (P4), Weather-by-Type PnL (P5). All 14 backend tests pass, all frontend UI features verified.

P1+P2: sigma_pipeline has calibration_max_adjustment_pct=0.25 (±25% cap) - PASS
P1+P2: sigma_pipeline status='widened_temporary' when multiplier > 1.0 - PASS
P1+P2: Config has sigma_overconfidence_multiplier, calibration_max_adjustment_pct, calibration_min_samples_per_segment - PASS

P3: Calibration metrics has by_lead_bracket breakdown - PASS
P3: Calibration metrics has by_market_type breakdown - PASS
P3: Calibration metrics has calibration_curve and sigma_evolution - PASS
P4: GET /api/strategies/weather-asymmetric/summary returns open_positions, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, wins, losses, win_rate, config, metrics - PASS
P4: Asymmetric config has enabled, max_market_price, min_model_prob, min_edge fields - PASS
P5: GET /api/analytics/weather-by-type returns all 4 types (temperature, precipitation, snowfall, wind) - PASS
P5: Each weather type has buy_count, close_count, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, wins, losses, win_rate - PASS

Calibration tab shows Calibration by Market Type: TEMPERATURE n=5 with coverage 40.0%, brier 1.0639 - PASS
Calibration tab shows Calibration Curve: Pred 1.84F vs Actual 2.34F, Ratio 1.27x - PASS
Asymmetric tab shows summary cards: 0 Open Positions, +$0.00 Realized/Unrealized, 0 Signals, 0% Win Rate - PASS

details: calibration_max_adjustment_pct=0.25 caps sigma adjustments within ±25% of defaults
calibration_min_samples_per_segment=30 requires 30 samples before using calibrated sigma
Current status shows Blending (5/30) - using weighted blend until 30 samples reached
Weather health endpoint correctly exposes all calibration guardrails in sigma_pipeline section
sigma_overconfidence_multiplier=1.25 widens all sigma values by 25%
sigma_pipeline.status='widened_temporary' clearly indicates widening is active
sigma_pipeline.overconfidence_active=true confirms feature is enabled
Frontend shows '1.25x' with ACTIVE badge and explanation: 'All sigma values widened by 25%'
by_lead_bracket segments metrics by forecast horizon (0-24h, 24-48h, etc.)
by_market_type segments by weather type (temperature currently has all 5 records)
calibration_curve shows predicted vs actual error with ratio for visual calibration assessment
sigma_evolution tracks recent forecasts with z-scores for trend analysis
Frontend displays all segments with proper formatting and OVERCONFIDENT/UNDERCONFIDENT badges
GET /api/strategies/weather-asymmetric/summary returns complete asymmetric strategy data
Config exposed: enabled=true, max_market_price=0.25, min_model_prob=0.4, min_edge=0.15, default_size=5, max_positions=10
Performance metrics: realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, wins, losses, win_rate all present
Frontend shows Total Risk and Max Reward calculations for open positions
No asymmetric positions yet (requires contracts priced ≤25¢ with ≥40% model probability)
GET /api/analytics/weather-by-type returns breakdown for all 4 weather types
Temperature: 778 buys, 9 open positions, $264.54 total size, -$0.10 unrealized PnL
Precipitation, Snowfall, Wind: 0 trades each (recently added market types)
Each type has: buy_count, close_count, open_positions, total_size, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, wins, losses, win_rate
Frontend shows cards for each type with proper coloring (amber=temp, blue=precip, cyan=snow, teal=wind)

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (5 resolved forecast records, 778 weather trades)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified all 5 priorities: (1) Controlled calibration with ±25% adjustment cap working - calibrate_sigma() enforces max_adjustment_pct=0.25 guardrail. (2) 1.25x overconfidence sigma widening active - all sigmas multiplied by 1.25 until calibration matures (shown in sigma_pipeline.status='widened_temporary'). (3) Calibration metrics segmented by lead_bracket and market_type - Brier score 1.06, 1σ coverage 40% indicates model is overconfident. (4) Asymmetric summary endpoint working - no positions yet (strict criteria: price≤25¢, prob≥40%, edge≥15%). (5) Weather-by-type breakdown shows 778 temperature trades, 0 for other types (precipitation/snowfall/wind added recently). 54 open weather positions total, realized PnL at $142.70 overall. Sigma trace appears in signal explanations when weather scans run.
